clusters.justification: This domain captures the broad spectrum of physiological arousal, emotional reactivity, and valenced feeling states typically subserved by cortico-limbic and salience networks.
This domain encompasses the computation of incentive salience, outcome appraisal, and reward-based decision-making heavily mediated by mesolimbic and striato-cortical pathways.

This domain integrates self-referential processing, autobiographical memory, and the projection of internal models onto other interacting agents, which are classic functional correlates of the default mode network.
